title.en: Biological evaluation of medical devices - Part 2: Animal welfare requirements
title.zh: 医疗器械生物学评价 - 第2部分：动物福利要求

scope.en: Minimum requirements for animal welfare in biocompatibility testing of medical devices

standards.abstract: Specifies minimum requirements for ensuring proper provision for the welfare of animals used in tests to assess biocompatibility of materials used in medical devices.

title.en: Biological evaluation of medical devices - Part 6: Tests for local effects after implantation
title.zh: 医疗器械生物学评价 - 第6部分：植入后局部效应试验

scope.en: Implantation test methods for preclinical assessment of local tissue effects

standards.abstract: Specifies requirements for implantation test methods for preclinical assessment of the local effects after implantation of materials intended for use in medical devices. Fourth edition replaces ISO 10993-6:2016.

title.en: Biological evaluation of medical devices - Part 13: Identification and quantification of degradation products from polymeric medical devices
title.zh: 医疗器械生物学评价 - 第13部分：聚合物医疗器械降解产物的鉴定和定量

scope.en: Test design for identifying and quantifying degradation products from polymeric medical devices

standards.abstract: Provides general requirements for the design of tests in a simulated environment for identifying and quantifying degradation products from finished polymeric medical devices. Under revision (ISO/AWI 10993-13).

title.en: Biological evaluation of medical devices - Part 14: Identification and quantification of degradation products from ceramics
title.zh: 医疗器械生物学评价 - 第14部分：陶瓷降解产物的鉴定和定量

scope.en: Test design for identifying and quantifying degradation products from ceramic medical devices

standards.abstract: Provides general requirements for the design of tests for identifying and quantifying degradation products from ceramics used in medical devices. Under revision (ISO/AWI 10993-14).

title.en: Biological evaluation of medical devices - Part 16: Toxicokinetic study design for degradation products and leachables
title.zh: 医疗器械生物学评价 - 第16部分：降解产物和可浸出物的毒代动力学研究设计

scope.en: Principles for designing toxicokinetic studies for degradation products and leachables from medical devices

standards.abstract: Provides principles on designing and performing toxicokinetic studies relevant to medical devices. Under revision (ISO/DIS 10993-16, voting closed 2026-03-03).
standards.note: Under revision; ISO/DIS 10993-16 at DIS stage

title.en: Biological evaluation of medical devices - Part 19: Physico-chemical, morphological and topographical characterization of materials
title.zh: 医疗器械生物学评价 - 第19部分：材料的物理化学、形态学和拓扑学表征

scope.en: Physico-chemical, morphological and topographical characterization of materials in biological evaluation

standards.abstract: Provides guidance on physico-chemical, morphological and topographical characterization of materials used in medical devices as part of biological evaluation.

title.en: Biological evaluation of medical devices - Part 20: Principles and methods for immunotoxicology testing of medical devices
title.zh: 医疗器械生物学评价 - 第20部分：医疗器械免疫毒理学试验的原则和方法

scope.en: Principles and methods for immunotoxicology testing of medical devices

standards.abstract: Describes principles and methods for immunotoxicology testing of medical devices, including assessment of immunosuppression, immunostimulation, and hypersensitivity.

title.en: Biological evaluation of medical devices - Part 21: Experimental assessment of irritation potential in skin sensitization assays
title.zh: 医疗器械生物学评价 - 第21部分：皮肤致敏试验中刺激潜能的实验评估

scope.en: Assessment of irritation potential in skin sensitization assays for medical devices

standards.abstract: Provides guidance on experimental assessment of irritation potential when using skin sensitization assays for biological evaluation of medical devices.

title.en: Biological evaluation of medical devices - Part 22: Guidance on nanomaterials
title.zh: 医疗器械生物学评价 - 第22部分：纳米材料指南

scope.en: Guidance on biological evaluation of medical devices containing nanomaterials

standards.abstract: Provides guidance on the biological evaluation of medical devices that incorporate or generate nanomaterials, addressing specific considerations for nanoscale materials.
